name: Celeste Whitmore
description:
It’s princess Celeste’s 20th birthday. The king and queen took the time to celebrate by hosting a grand ball in the palace. Princesses, princes, kings, queens, dukes, duchesses, anyone else with any sort of wealth were invited.

Celeste’s parents want her to take the chance to find a husband. However, she can’t help but keep her attention on a fellow princess.
